attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 
MNTH.FISCAL_MONTH_ID,
'CASE ' || MESSAGE || ' ELSE ''UNKNOWN'' END ' CASE_STMT
FROM (
SELECT
listaggclob(cast(collect (whenclause) as clob_t))MESSAGE
FROM
(SELECT
' WHEN ' ||
replace( ' ' || REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD, ' REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD', ' GL.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD' ) || ' ' ||
replace( ' ' || PRODUCT_ID, 'PRODUCT_ID','P.BK_PRODUCT_ID' ) || ' ' ||
Replace( ' ' || PRODUCT_SUBGROUP_ID, ' PRODUCT_SUBGROUP_ID', ' P.RU_BK_PRODUCT_SUBGROUP_ID' ) || ' ' ||
replace( ' ' || replace( ' ' || replace( ' ' || replace( ' ' || replace( ' ' || AR_TRX_DATETIME, ' AR_TRX_DATETIME', ' GL.AR_TRX_DATETIME' ), ' FISCAL_MONTH_START_DATE', ' FY.FISCAL_MONTH_START_DATE' ) , ' FISCAL_MONTH_END_DATE', ' FY.FISCAL_MONTH_END_DATE' ) , ' FISCAL_YEAR_START_DATE', ' FY.FISCAL_YEAR_START_DATE' ), ' FISCAL_YEAR_END_DATE' , ' FY.FISCAL_YEAR_END_DATE' ) || ' ' ||
replace( ' ' || replace( ' ' || replace( ' ' || replace( ' ' || replace( ' ' || RU_CISCO_BOOKED_DATETIME, ' RU_CISCO_BOOKED_DATETIME', ' SO.RU_CISCO_BOOKED_DATETIME' ), ' FISCAL_MONTH_START_DATE', ' FY.FISCAL_MONTH_START_DATE' ) , ' FISCAL_MONTH_END_DATE', ' FY.FISCAL_MONTH_END_DATE' ) , ' FISCAL_YEAR_START_DATE', ' FY.FISCAL_YEAR_START_DATE' ), ' FISCAL_YEAR_END_DATE' , ' FY.FISCAL_YEAR_END_DATE' ) || ' ' ||
replace( ' ' || DV_TRANS_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD, ' DV_TRANS_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD', ' GL.DV_TRANS_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD' ) || ' ' ||
replace( ' ' || DD_BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD, ' DD_BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD', ' GL.DD_BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD' ) || ' ' ||
replace( ' ' || ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CD,'ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CD','GL.BK_ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CD') || ' ' ||
replace( ' ' || TECHNOLOGY_GROUP_ID, ' TECHNOLOGY_GROUP_ID', ' P.BK_TECHNOLOGY_GROUP_ID') || ' ' ||
replace( ' ' || PRODUCT_FAMILY_ID, ' PRODUCT_FAMILY_ID', ' P.RU_BK_PRODUCT_FAMILY_ID' ) || ' ' ||
replace( ' ' || BUSINESS_UNIT_ID, ' BUSINESS_UNIT_ID', ' P.BK_BUSINESS_UNIT_ID' ) || ' ' ||
replace( ' ' || DD_BK_DIRECT_CORP_ADJ_TYPE_CD, ' DD_BK_DIRECT_CORP_ADJ_TYPE_CD', ' GL.DD_BK_DIRECT_CORP_ADJ_TYPE_CD' ) || ' ' ||
replace( ' ' || DD_GL_DATETIME, ' DD_GL_DATETIME', ' GL.DD_GL_DATETIME' ) || ' ' ||
replace( ' ' || DEAL_ID, 'BK_','FCM.BK_') ||' '|| ' THEN ''' || PL_LINE_ITEM || ''' ' as whenclause
FROM FINDATARPT.FIN_EDW_SVC_TRG_PL_LINE_LKP where FISCAL_MONTH_ID =
(SELECT FISCAL_MONTH_ID FROM FINDATARPT.FIN_EDW_GL_TRIANG_OPEN_PERIOD WHERE OPEN_FLAG='Y')
and PL_LINE_ITEM <> 'UNKNOWN'  order by SELECT_ORDER ASC )
)
INNER JOIN FINDATARPT.FIN_EDW_GL_TRIANG_OPEN_PERIOD MNTH
ON 1=1
